subject: My private affiliate black book
body:
I try to make helping me the most valuable thing I can do for someone.

I'm doing this in 3 ways:

- Prizes (for you and your audience)
- Education (showing you the play by play of what's working so you can immediately use for your business)
- My private affiliate blackbook

I've already talked about 1 & 2. So what's #3?

The private affiliate blackbook contains everything you need to make referring friends fast, easy, and effective:

- The text/slack messages you can send your friends to invite them
- The posts you can model to invite your audience
- The email sequence you can use to send to your list
- The ads we already know work/convert so you can use them to get ahead.

If you want the prizes (like a 1-on-1 30min in-person podcast with me + a day here in Vegas), you want the behind the scenes play by play, or my private affiliate black book…

All you have to do it register to refer friends here.

PS - This is the last email I'll send about this.
